jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at PolicyBazaar
jsonLd.description:
Join the PolicyBazaar family as a Frontend Developer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About PolicyBazaar:
PolicyBazaar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PolicyBazaar!
